name: microsoft-365
description: Microsoft 365 integration extension — unified access to Word, Excel, PowerPoint, OneDrive, Outlook, and Teams via Microsoft Graph API.

capabilities.docs: Read, write, and export Word/Excel/PowerPoint documents
capabilities.onedrive: Search, retrieve, and upload files on OneDrive
capabilities.outlook: Read, send, and search Outlook emails
capabilities.calendar: Create and retrieve Outlook calendar events
capabilities.teams: Send and receive Microsoft Teams messages

note: Register an app in Azure AD and configure Microsoft Graph API permissions.
author: Zero-Employee Orchestrator Team
